channel.title: Founders Threads Updates
channel.description: Route launches, pilot drive alerts, and product updates from Founders Threads.

item.title: New route drops
item.description: Fresh walking and driving story collections as they go live.

item.title: Pilot ride alerts
item.description: Invites for field tests, premium audio launches, and heritage viewer updates.

item.title: Founder notes
item.description: Short product and curation updates pulled into one RSS feed.
